name: Beachley Peninsula & Severn Confluence
highlights: Where the Wye meets the Severn, directly beneath the original Severn Bridge.
points_of_interest: Old Severn Bridge (1966); Chapel Rock (ancient religious site)
viewpoints: Severn Bridge; Aust cliffs opposite; Wye entering Severn
food_drink_nearby: The Old Ferry Inn Beachley (closed at last check — verify); Chepstow pubs
public_transport: Bus to Chepstow then short walk
hazards_notes: Strong tides; MoD Beachley Barracks restrictions
